entries.text: Hello, I'm Peter Park, working as a chaplain at Eminent Hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: The first time I started hospice work was in 2012.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I started working in the US hospice for the first time.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: At that time, I learned about the US hospice system.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: And I met various patients.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: So I realized that hospice work is very precious and important.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It's been about 10 years.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I'm not working alone in hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I work as a team.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I mainly work as a doctor, nurse, social worker, chaplain, and other nurses.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I work as a team.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I think chaplain can be divided into two major roles.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: One is the SCS, future counselor, and BC.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: There are two areas of treatment.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: As you know, there are many patients who work in hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: There is a lot of difficulty in their life.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If we control the pain when there is a physical pain, the quality of
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: life is improved a lot.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Likewise, as there is a physical pain, many people live with a spiritual pain in their heart.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I think there are a lot of people who can't think of it as important.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you get control through counseling, the quality of life is improved a lot.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I think there are more people who have suffered from hospice's death.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Especially, hospice chaplain service is very precious.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It's about taking care of those who are isolated and counseling.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Through that, you can get rid of the pain in your heart.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: How can you end a more meaningful life?

entries.text: I remember one of the patients who was in the hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: One of the patients was trying to commit suicide while receiving care.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It was a person who tried to stop his own life because he had
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: a lot of loneliness and sadness.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It was a person who tried to stop his own life because he had
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: a lot of sadness and sadness.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If he had received the hospice service a little more, he would have thought
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: that his life would have changed.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Another person was a person who had already been discharged from the hospital in January this year.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He told her that he loved her.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He was a person who couldn't say that he loved her so easily.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: But after he left, I talked to my son and my father in the
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: middle of the conversation.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He said that his father loved him.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: When I heard that, I felt a lot of pressure on this matter.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Another person is a person who has received care now.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He is a very active person in the past.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He doesn't have anything. He thinks everything is perfect.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: But a few weeks ago, he told me that he had something he wanted
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: to say to me.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He suddenly changed his face and started crying.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He told me that he couldn't say anything to me.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: He also told me that he had a lot of sadness in his heart.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I was really surprised that he had such a weak side.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I was really surprised that he had such a weak side.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: But I couldn't say anything to anyone in my heart.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: After that, I prayed for him.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: After that, I saw his face getting brighter.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I realized that the need for hospice, counseling, and chaplain was a valuable experience.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Koreans think that hospice is like, why should I die?
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Why should I think about hospice?
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I don't need that. That's how I approach hospice.
